visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a distressed expression, his eyes wide and his mouth slightly agape. He holds a lit cigarette to his lips, and a thin wisp of smoke curls upwards. He is wearing a dark suit jacket. In the foreground, the out-of-focus shoulder and hand of another person are visible, suggesting a tense confrontation. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera is tight on the man's face, emphasizing his emotional state. A man shouts in a loud, urgent, and agitated voice, "快点走啊!" (Hurry up and go!). His tone is filled with panic and impatience, as if he's in a dangerous or stressful situation and is trying to force someone to leave immediately. The scene cuts to a different man, also in a close-up. He wears glasses and a suit with a tie. He brings a cigarette to his lips and takes a drag, looking down and to the side with a calm, focused demeanor. The background remains dark and blurry. The "风行网" text is still visible in the top left corner. The camera is steady, capturing
